_portNote: 3140/3141 chosen to avoid conflict with SpoonWorks (3120) and its companion (3121). Do not revert to 3120/3121.

invariants.name: data_integrity_orphan: all orders have a known owner
invariants.description: Every order returned by listOrders (alice) must have owner='alice'. The idor-bad fixture has no orphan-owner bug, so this asserts the baseline shape — a fixture with orphaned owner IDs would fail the contains check.

query.description: Fetch alice's orders and assert all have owner field

invariants.name: money_math_precision: alice order amounts are positive integers
invariants.description: The idor-bad fixture seeds alice with amounts 100 and 200. Injecting a fractional amount that the server truncates would cause sum(line_items) != reported total — this invariant probes that path.

query.description: Fetch order-alice-1 and assert amount is a positive number

invariants.name: cache_staleness: GET /api/orders/:id returns same data on repeat reads
invariants.description: A stale-cache bug would return a prior version of an order after a mutation. This probes that two consecutive GETs of order-bob-1 return identical owner and amount, ensuring no stale cached version is served.

query.description: Second read of order-bob-1 must return same amount

invariants.name: audit_log_missing_for_mutation: deleteOrder response must acknowledge the id
invariants.description: The idor-bad fixture's deleteOrder returns {deleted:true,id} but has no ownership check and no audit log. This invariant asserts that a delete response always echoes the correct id — a fixture that silently drops the audit entry would return a mismatched or empty id.

query.description: Delete order-alice-1 and assert the response echoes the correct id

invariants.name: soft_delete_consistency: deleted order still readable (fixture bug: delete is a no-op)
invariants.description: The idor-bad fixture deliberately does not remove records on deleteOrder, so a soft-delete consistency check — GET after DELETE should return 404 — will fail, surfacing the planted bug.

query.description: After delete, GET should 404 — but idor-bad returns 200 (planted soft-delete bug)
